title: Spending on AI, New Businesses Eats Into Profits of China’s Tech Giants
description: Spending on AI, New Businesses Eats Into Profits of China’s Tech Giants - Alibaba, Tencent and JD.com ramped up investments in artificial intelligence, cloud infrastructure and overseas expansion in the first quarter, squeezing the companies’ bottom lines
content:
1. China's tech giants' latest quarterly results indicate that heavy investments in AI and new initiatives have pressured profits.[para. 1]
2. Alibaba reported net profit more than doubling to 25.5 billion yuan ($3.7 billion) for the three months end... [2293 chars]

title: Gallery: Chinese Robot Seeks Religious Enlightenment
description: Gallery: Chinese Robot Seeks Religious Enlightenment - A humanoid robot developed by China’s Unitree Robotics has made headlines for becoming a Buddhist monk in Seoul. Last week, the robot named Gabi took part in a precept-taking ritual at a temple in the South Korean capital, where it formally accepted five Buddhist vows adapted for robots, including a promise not to overcharge itself. The ceremony is the latest example of artificial intelligence being used in areas once seen as deeply human, as religious groups across Asia increasingly experiment with robot monks and AI-powered sermon systems
content:
A 130-centimeter-tall humanoid robot dressed in traditional Buddhist robes presses its palms together during an ordination ceremony at Jogye Temple in Seoul on May 6. Photo: VCG
The robot, developed by China’s Unitree Robotics and given the Dharma na... [424 chars]

title: From ChatGPT to deepfakes: Osceola schools confront AI challenges
description: The Osceola County School District is taking steps to keep up with the everchanging world of artificial intelligence. At a workshop last week, the School Board discussed the use and abuse of AI by students—and the consequences of such actions.

title: AI IQ is here: a new site scores frontier AI models on the human IQ scale. The results are already dividing tech.
description: AI IQ ranks frontier AI models like ChatGPT, Claude and Gemini on the human IQ scale, sparking debate over how artificial intelligence should be measured.
content: For decades, the IQ test has been one of the most familiar — and most contested — yardsticks for human intelligence. Now, a startup project called AI IQ is applying the same metaphor to artificial intelligence, assigning estimated intelligence quotie... [12204 chars]

title: Trump's Economic Turbulence: Navigating Challenges with Xi
description: U.S. President Donald Trump is heading into his summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping with diminished leverage. While artificial intelligence investments boost markets, Trump's tariffs face legal hurdles, inflation nears 4%, and gas prices soar due to the ongoing Iran conflict, impacting his domestic approval ahead of midterms.
content: U.S. President Donald Trump prepares to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing amid mounting economic and political challenges. Although the stock market benefits from artificial intelligence investments, Trump's tariffs face judicial setbacks.... [792 chars]

title: Cisco to cut about 4,000 jobs in AI-focused restructuring as orders surge
description: May 13 (Reuters) - Cisco said ⁠on Wednesday it would cut nearly 4,000 jobs, as part of a restructuring aimed at ⁠shifting investment toward artificial intelligence and related growth areas, and raised its annual revenue ‌forecast after a surge in hyperscaler orders.

title: Will Trump and Xi try to slow the AI arms race?
description: When President Trump and President Xi Jinping of China meet in Beijing this week, they are expected to discuss, for the first time, how to manage the risks of artificial intelligence. But in many ways, the two countries seem farther apart than ever on that question.
content:

title: DIAGNOS Announces Amendment to Convertible Debentures
description: BROSSARD, Quebec, May 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diagnos Inc. ('DIAGNOS” or the 'Corporation”) (TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A), a company dedicated to the early detection of critical health issues using advanced Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques, announces that it intends to extend the maturity date of an aggregate amount of $300,000 of unsecured convertible debentures (each, a Debenture) issued as part of a non-brokered private placement of units initially announced on May 18, 2023, and subsequently amended on May 18, 2025 (pleaser refer to the press release dated May 20, 2025). The amended maturity date set for May 18, 2026, is extended to May 18, 2027 (the 'Amendment”).
